title: orchis coriophora var. polliniana
intro: Orchis coriophora var. polliniana, also known as the Autumn Ladies' Tresses, is a type of orchid that belongs to the Orchidaceae family. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Orchis coriophora var. polliniana are said to include aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to support urinary tract health. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are believed to unlock its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health ailments.
